title: Sapphic Serenity
description: A simple and subtle resourcepack to make your world more lesbian/sapphic! Show your true LGBTQ+ colours with this pack ^^
body:
# This pack will not get updated! I don't really have the motivation to upkeep a resourcepack, so I'm sorry to say this will likely not receive any updates. And if it does they will be sparse and small. ## What is Sapphic Serenity? Sapphic Serenity is a sapphic, or more precisely — lesbian — themed resource pack! I made this resourcepack because all of the lesbian themed resourcepacks I saw were outdated and didn't work on the newer versions. Thus, this is a resourcepack that features subtle changes to the game to make it more queer! ## What if I don't like a feature? If any of the things in the resourcepack don't sit right with you, you can easily get rid of them by deleting textures in the file, that way you can delete any unwanted changes.
Features
Version 0.1

- Lesbian hearts
- Lesbian recipe book
- Heart crosshair
- Custom splashtext + end credits
- Better suspicious sand/gravel visibility
- Replaced the "Humble" painting
- Less obtrusive pumpkin overlay (+ make it gay!)
- Lesbian spectral arrow
- LGBTQ+ map markers and beds
- Lesbean totem of undying
- Lesbian bookshelves and enchanting table
- No brown leather in dyed armour and no armadillo scute on dog armour
- Lesbian XP bar!
- Lesbian Allays
--- ![Sapphic Serenity (name of the texture pack)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49d44891f5bedebec017bc76c68de83c27bf9919.png)
[Enter your suggestions for future updates!](https://forms.gle/1L55TWi2twpSvRQZA) (Google form link)
